items.headline: Edmonton Oilers Jason Dickinson shines in long-awaited playoff return
items.description: EDMONTON -- Jason Dickinson had not played a game in the Stanley Cup Playoffs since 2020, and there was some doubt whether he would be available to the Edmonton Oilers for Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round against the Anaheim Ducks.

items.headline: Dallas Stars raises level of play in Game 2 win against Wild
items.description: DALLAS -- The Dallas Stars showed up in the Stanley Cup Playoffs on Monday and won 4-2 against the Minnesota Wild in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at American Airlines Center to even the best-of-7 series 1-1.

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Edmonton Oilers Game 1 recap April 20 2026
items.description: EDMONTON -- Kasperi Kapanen scored his second goal of the game with 1:54 remaining in the third period, and the Edmonton Oilers rallied for a 4-3 win against the Anaheim Ducks in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at Rogers Place on Monday.

items.headline: Minnesota Wild Dallas Stars game 2 recap April 20 2026
items.description: DALLAS -- Wyatt Johnston scored twice, and the Dallas Stars defeated the Minnesota Wild 4-2 in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at American Airlines Center on Monday.

items.headline: Jordan Martinook redeems himself in 2OT for Hurricanes Game 2 win
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Jordan Martinook struggled for words to describe what he was feeling.
He had just scored the game-winning goal at 13:53 of the second overtime in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round to give the Carolina Hurricanes a 3-2 victory against the Ottawa Senators at Lenovo

items.headline: Ottawa Senators Carolina Hurricanes Game 2 recap April 20 2026
items.description: RALEIGH, N.C. -- Jordan Martinook scored at 13:53 of double overtime to give the Carolina Hurricanes a 3-2 win against the Ottawa Senators in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Lenovo Center on Monday.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Leon Draisaitl could play Game 1 for Edmonton against Anaheim
items.description:
EDMONTON -- Leon Draisaitl was activated off injured reserve and returned for the Edmonton Oilers in a 4-3 win against the Anaheim Ducks in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at Rogers Place on Monday.
He had two assists in 22:06 of ice time in the win.

items.headline: Mats Zuccarello out for Wild in Game 2 with upper-body injury
items.description:
DALLAS -- Mats Zuccarello has an upper-body injury and did not play for the Minnesota Wild in a 4-2 loss to the Dallas Stars in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at American Airlines Center on Monday.

items.headline: Roope Hintz injury status update April 20, 2026
items.description:
DALLAS -- Roope Hintz remains out for the Dallas Stars, and the timeline for his return was pushed back prior to a 4-2 win against the Minnesota Wild in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round on Monday.

items.headline: Porter Martone playing beyond his years for Flyers in playoffs
items.description: PITTSBURGH -- Porter Martone prepared all season for this moment.

items.headline: Artem Zub out for Ottawa Senators in Game 2
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Artem Zub did not play for the Ottawa Senators in a 3-2 loss in double overtime to the Carolina Hurricanes in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Lenovo Center on Monday.

items.headline: Return of Alexandre Carrier sparks Canadiens win over Lightning in Game 1
items.description: TAMPA -- At the start of the third period of Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round series between the Montreal Canadiens and Tampa Bay Lightning on Sunday, Alexandre Carrier bowled over Lightning forward Anthony Cirelli with a solid shoulder check. items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers Pittsburgh Penguins game 2 recap April 20 2026
items.description: PITTSBURGH -- Dan Vladar made 27 saves, including 25 in the final two periods, and Porter Martone scored for the second straight game for the Philadelphia Flyers, who extended their lead in the Eastern Conference First Round with a 3-0 win against the Pittsburgh Penguins in Game 2 at PPG

items.headline: Los Angeles Angles Zach Neto cheers on Anaheim Ducks
items.description:
The Anaheim Ducks have an Angel near the outfield cheering them on.
Before the Los Angeles Angels game on Monday, shortstop Zach Neto rocked his Ducks jersey to celebrate Anaheim’s first playoff game since 2018.
